caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, silver-gray pompadour hairstyle and glasses wears black headphones, a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bowtie, and light-colored suspenders. He is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items hanging on racks. On-screen graphics appear as overlays, including a logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST." Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his mouth open. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, and his head moves minimally while he focuses forward. The lighting remains consistent, and the overall environment stays static as the man continues his address to the microphone.
